active_ingredients.name: Dinotefuran
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Systemic neonicotinoid that disrupts insect nervous system causing paralysis and death

active_ingredients.name: Pymetrozine
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Feeding blocker that stops sap sucking insects from feeding leading to starvation

description: Controls sucking insects effectively with long residual action.
recommendation: Use as foliar spray at recommended dose.
farmer_symptoms: کپاس تے سفید مکھی بہت اے

master_descriptions.english: Dual action systemic insecticide for fast and long control of sucking pests.
master_descriptions.urdu: چوسنے والے کیڑوں کے فوری اور دیرپا کنٹرول کے لیے سسٹمک دوا۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: چوسن والے کیڑیاں دے فوری تے لمبے کنٹرول لئی سسٹمک دوا۔
